name: Alex Thompson
quote: Siam delivered 4 production websites ahead of schedule. His work directly drove a 1.5x increase in our client revenue — he doesn't just write code, he understands business impact.

name: Dr. Rahman
quote: His RAG pipeline work was remarkably production-ready for an intern. He built evaluation frameworks that we're still using months later. A rare engineer who bridges ML research and shipping.

name: Sarah Chen
quote: Our online ordering platform went from zero to 50,000+ customers. The 4.9-star rating speaks for itself — Siam built something our customers genuinely love using.

name: Prof. Hasan
quote: Publishing 3 peer-reviewed papers while leading a 5-person game dev team and maintaining Dean's List — Siam's ability to deliver across research and engineering is exceptional.
